violations.text: Sanitizer bucket was observed in the hand-washing sink in the ware washing area. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Sanitizer bucket was removed at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025

The walk-in cooler was observed fluctuating between 38-46 degrees Fahrenheit. Food products in unit were observed between 42-43 DF. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Service arrived at the time of inspection and walk-in cooler was observed holding an ambient temperature of 41 DF Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025
Refrigerator door gasket on the two door fridge was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good condition. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024
